page.title: Flavia — Your intimate support
page.description: Talk with Flavia about desire, communication, pleasure and emotional connection. A safe space to transform your intimate life.

hero.headline_prefix: You don't know how to start that conversation.
hero.subline: Because it's not just what you say. It's how you say it.
hero.credential: Sexologist, writer and therapist with more than 20 years of experience
hero.preview_user: I don't know how to tell them I don't feel the same anymore.
hero.preview_assistant: You don't have to say it perfectly. First let's understand what has changed for you.

how_it_works.title: A simple flow to move forward for real

speak.title: Speak without filtering yourself
speak.description: Start wherever you are: doubts, tension, blockage or the desire to reconnect. Flavia receives your context without judgment.

guidance.title: Flavia guides you
guidance.description: She gives you emotional clarity and structures the conversation with questions and frameworks that are easy to apply.

progress.title: Explore and move forward
progress.description: With each chat, reflection turns into concrete steps to improve communication, desire and connection.

context.title: You don't have to explain yourself perfectly

movement.title: You don't stay stuck in circles

practical.title: It's not theory
practical.description: It's real phrases and real steps.

cta_section.title: That conversation you've been avoiding... you can start it today.
cta_section.description: You don't need to have it all clear. You just need to start.

chat_demo.title: This is what talking with Flavia feels like
chat_demo.description: This isn't a typical chatbot: Flavia gives you context back, helps lower the emotional noise and offers clear actions so you can move forward conversation by conversation.
chat_demo.prompt_1: I feel jealous and shut down before I can talk
chat_demo.prompt_2: I don't know how to say what I need
chat_demo.prompt_3: I want to reconnect with my partner
chat_demo.message_user: I don't know how to tell them I don't feel the same anymore.
chat_demo.message_assistant: Are you afraid of hurting them or of everything changing?

topics.title: Start with what matters to you today

quote.text: Intimacy doesn't begin when the lights go out. It begins in the way they look at you, in the way they ask how you are.
